scope_note: Curated seed list of public OSINT and public-record sources for J-Stack routing. It is not exhaustive, not legal advice, and not permission to scrape, bypass access controls, or publish sensitive personal data. Verify each source's current terms, license, and official status before use.

sources.name: OpenCorporates
sources.license_tos: Check OpenCorporates terms and API terms before automated use.
sources.best_for: Cross-jurisdiction company discovery and officer/entity leads.
sources.caution: Often an index into official registers; verify material facts at the original registry.
sources.citation_note: Cite the official registry for final assertions when available; cite OpenCorporates as an index.

sources.name: GLEIF LEI Search
sources.license_tos: GLEIF publishes LEI data under its stated open-data terms; check current license before reuse.
sources.best_for: Identifying legal entities and corporate hierarchy via LEI records.
sources.caution: LEI coverage is incomplete and concentrated among financial/regulated entities.
sources.citation_note: Cite LEI and registration status with retrieval date.

sources.name: UK Companies House Find and update company information
sources.license_tos: Use Companies House API and website terms; documents may contain personal data.
sources.best_for: UK company identity, filings, directors, PSC records, charges, accounts.
sources.caution: Identity matches need corroboration; officer addresses and birthdays are sensitive.
sources.citation_note: Cite company number, filing date, document type, and retrieval date.

sources.name: SEC EDGAR
sources.license_tos: Follow SEC fair-access and bulk-download guidance.
sources.best_for: US public-company disclosures and regulated filings.
sources.caution: SEC filings are issuer/legal disclosures, not independent proof of every factual assertion.
sources.citation_note: Cite accession number, form type, filing date, and exhibit where applicable.

sources.name: SEDAR+
sources.license_tos: Check SEDAR+ terms and securities-regulator guidance.
sources.best_for: Canadian public issuer filings.
sources.caution: Coverage and document availability differ by issuer and filing type.
sources.citation_note: Cite issuer, filing type, date, and regulator record.

sources.name: EDINET
sources.license_tos: Check FSA EDINET access terms and language limitations.
sources.best_for: Japanese securities filings and issuer disclosure.
sources.caution: Japanese-language source; translation risk must be recorded.
sources.citation_note: Cite EDINET document, issuer, and filing date.

sources.name: Unternehmensregister
sources.license_tos: Check portal terms; some documents or extracts may have access restrictions.
sources.best_for: German company publications and financial statements.
sources.caution: Portal is authoritative for publications but may not replace Handelsregister extracts.
sources.citation_note: Cite company, publication type, date, and register reference.

sources.name: Handelsregister
sources.license_tos: Check official portal terms and fees; do not bypass access controls.
sources.best_for: German commercial-register facts.
sources.caution: Some documents may require paid retrieval; personal data minimization required.
sources.citation_note: Cite register court, register number, document type, and retrieval date.

sources.name: Registro Público de Panamá
sources.license_tos: Use official registry access rules; paid or account-based extracts may apply.
sources.best_for: Panama public registry leads and official extracts where available.
sources.caution: Do not infer beneficial ownership or control solely from names; verify extracts.
sources.citation_note: Cite official entry/extract identifiers and retrieval date.

sources.name: ASIC Registers
sources.license_tos: Check ASIC search terms and fee rules.
sources.best_for: Australian companies and registered business names.
sources.caution: Some details require paid extracts; identity matches need corroboration.
sources.citation_note: Cite ACN/ABN, register record, and retrieval date.

sources.name: New Zealand Companies Register
sources.license_tos: Check Companies Office terms.
sources.best_for: New Zealand company identity and filings.
sources.caution: Director and shareholder data may be personal data; minimize in outputs.
sources.citation_note: Cite NZBN/company number, filing, and retrieval date.

sources.name: ACRA BizFile
sources.license_tos: Check ACRA terms, fees, and permitted reuse.
sources.best_for: Singapore company and business-record lookup.
sources.caution: Official extracts may be paid; do not automate login or paid flows.
sources.citation_note: Cite ACRA record or extract details.

sources.name: Hong Kong Companies Registry ICRIS
sources.license_tos: Check ICRIS terms, fee, and access rules.
sources.best_for: Hong Kong company-record retrieval.
sources.caution: Manual/paid access may apply; respect portal restrictions.
sources.citation_note: Cite company number, document name, and retrieval date.

sources.name: OpenSanctions
sources.license_tos: Check OpenSanctions dataset licenses and source-specific restrictions.
sources.best_for: Screening names across many sanctions and risk lists for leads.
sources.caution: OpenSanctions aggregates; verify designations at the original authority before publishing.
sources.citation_note: Cite OpenSanctions as aggregation and cite original list for final designation facts.

sources.name: EU Sanctions Map
sources.license_tos: Check EU site terms and official legal acts on EUR-Lex.
sources.best_for: EU sanctions regime overview and legal-act pointers.
sources.caution: For named designations, verify in the official consolidated list and EUR-Lex act.
sources.citation_note: Cite legal act and consolidated-list entry for final claims.

sources.name: EU Financial Sanctions Consolidated List
sources.license_tos: Check data.europa.eu dataset terms and official update timestamp.
sources.best_for: EU financial-sanctions named-person/entity checks.
sources.caution: Still verify statement of reasons in the legal act where claims go beyond list membership.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset timestamp plus EUR-Lex act where material.

sources.name: OFAC Sanctions List Search
sources.license_tos: Use OFAC data and search guidance; bulk data is separately published by OFAC.
sources.best_for: US sanctions name checks.
sources.caution: Name similarity is not a match; publish only after identifier-level verification.
sources.citation_note: Cite OFAC list, program, identifiers, and retrieval date.

sources.name: UN Security Council Consolidated List
sources.license_tos: Use UN list terms and official update date.
sources.best_for: UN sanctions designation checks.
sources.caution: UN narrative summaries can be politically sensitive; quote carefully and date the list.
sources.citation_note: Cite list entry number, identifiers, and update date.

sources.name: UK OFSI Consolidated List Search
sources.license_tos: Check OFSI usage terms and consolidated list downloads.
sources.best_for: UK financial-sanctions checks.
sources.caution: Verify identifiers; do not rely on name-only matches.
sources.citation_note: Cite OFSI entry, regime, identifiers, and retrieval date.

sources.name: Canada Consolidated Autonomous Sanctions List
sources.license_tos: Check Global Affairs Canada terms and update date.
sources.best_for: Canadian sanctions checks.
sources.caution: List membership must be separated from allegations in external commentary.
sources.citation_note: Cite Canadian list, regulation, and retrieval date.

sources.name: World Bank Listing of Ineligible Firms and Individuals
sources.license_tos: Check World Bank terms and sanctions-system explanations.
sources.best_for: Procurement debarment and integrity sanctions checks.
sources.caution: Debarment is not the same as a criminal conviction; preserve legal wording.
sources.citation_note: Cite firm/person, grounds category where stated, period, and retrieval date.

sources.name: SAM.gov Exclusions
sources.license_tos: Use SAM.gov terms and account/access rules; APIs may need registration.
sources.best_for: US federal exclusion checks for contractors and grantees.
sources.caution: Avoid treating exclusion data as proof of broader misconduct.
sources.citation_note: Cite SAM UEI/CAGE/name, exclusion type, and retrieval date.

sources.name: Tenders Electronic Daily
sources.license_tos: Check TED terms and eForms data guidance.
sources.best_for: EU procurement opportunities and awards above thresholds.
sources.caution: TED notices can be incomplete; verify award facts with authority documents where possible.
sources.citation_note: Cite notice number, publication date, contracting authority, and lot.

sources.name: SAM.gov
sources.license_tos: Check SAM.gov terms and API/account rules.
sources.best_for: US federal procurement opportunities and entity registration leads.
sources.caution: Account/API access may be needed; do not bypass rate limits or login rules.
sources.citation_note: Cite notice ID, agency, date, and URL.

sources.name: USAspending.gov
sources.license_tos: USAspending offers API/bulk data; check data definitions and caveats.
sources.best_for: US federal spending, recipients, agencies, award amounts.
sources.caution: Award data can lag and classifications can be messy; verify large claims with source documents.
sources.citation_note: Cite award ID, recipient, agency, fiscal year, and retrieval date.

sources.name: World Bank Projects and Operations
sources.license_tos: Check World Bank data terms.
sources.best_for: World Bank projects, financing, procurement, and project documents.
sources.caution: Project pages do not prove performance or misconduct without supporting documents.
sources.citation_note: Cite project ID, document title, and date.

sources.name: UNGM Contract Awards
sources.license_tos: Check UNGM terms and agency-specific procurement rules.
sources.best_for: UN procurement award leads.
sources.caution: Coverage varies by agency; verify with procurement notices and agency records.
sources.citation_note: Cite award, agency, supplier, date, and retrieval date.

sources.name: UK Contracts Finder
sources.license_tos: Check UK government terms and Crown copyright/open-government license notes.
sources.best_for: UK public-sector contract notices and awards.
sources.caution: Not all devolved/local or high-value procurement is fully captured here.
sources.citation_note: Cite notice ID, buyer, supplier, value, and date.

sources.name: AusTender
sources.license_tos: Check AusTender terms and Commonwealth procurement rules.
sources.best_for: Australian Government procurement notices and contracts.
sources.caution: Contract amendments and panel arrangements need careful interpretation.
sources.citation_note: Cite ATM/CN number, agency, supplier, and date.

sources.name: EU Funding and Tenders Portal
sources.license_tos: Check portal terms and programme-specific rules.
sources.best_for: EU grants, funded projects, beneficiaries, calls, and programme documents.
sources.caution: Grant participation does not establish policy influence or misconduct.
sources.citation_note: Cite project ID, call, programme, beneficiaries, and date.

sources.name: EUR-Lex
sources.license_tos: EU legal texts are public; verify CELEX and consolidation status.
sources.best_for: EU legal acts, preparatory acts, consolidated law, and case law.
sources.caution: Always distinguish proposal, adopted act, consolidated text, and case-law status.
sources.citation_note: Cite CELEX number, date, title, and consolidation date if relevant.

sources.name: HUDOC ECHR
sources.license_tos: Use HUDOC terms and official judgment status.
sources.best_for: European human-rights case law.
sources.caution: Distinguish Chamber, Grand Chamber, finality, and admissibility decisions.
sources.citation_note: Cite application number, chamber, date, and paragraph.

sources.name: CourtListener
sources.license_tos: Check Free Law Project terms and data sources.
sources.best_for: US case-law and docket leads.
sources.caution: For consequential claims, verify against official court documents or RECAP where possible.
sources.citation_note: Cite CourtListener page and official docket/opinion where possible.

sources.name: RECAP Archive
sources.license_tos: Check Free Law Project terms; PACER-origin documents can contain personal data.
sources.best_for: US federal court filings obtained through RECAP.
sources.caution: Court filings may contain allegations and private data; redact/minimize before reuse.
sources.citation_note: Cite docket number, filing number, court, and document date.

sources.name: Supreme Court of the United States Opinions
sources.license_tos: Official Supreme Court opinions are public; check slip vs bound versions.
sources.best_for: Official US Supreme Court opinions.
sources.caution: Slip opinions can be revised; record version/date.
sources.citation_note: Cite case name, docket, US reporter/slip opinion date, and page/pin.

sources.name: Bundesverfassungsgericht Entscheidungen
sources.license_tos: Use official BVerfG decisions and press releases carefully.
sources.best_for: German constitutional-law decisions and official releases.
sources.caution: Press releases are summaries; final assertions should cite decision text.
sources.citation_note: Cite docket, date, chamber/senate, and paragraph.

sources.name: Bundesgerichtshof Entscheidungen
sources.license_tos: Use official BGH site terms and decision text.
sources.best_for: German Federal Court of Justice decisions and press releases.
sources.caution: Press releases are not full reasons; cite decision where available.
sources.citation_note: Cite docket, date, and paragraph/page.

sources.name: CanLII
sources.license_tos: Check CanLII terms and court/source status.
sources.best_for: Canadian legal research and case-law lookup.
sources.caution: Verify currency and official status for statutory text.
sources.citation_note: Cite CanLII reference plus court/date/paragraph.

sources.name: BAILII
sources.license_tos: Check BAILII terms and neutral citation status.
sources.best_for: UK/Ireland case law and legal materials.
sources.caution: Coverage is broad but not complete; use neutral citations.
sources.citation_note: Cite neutral citation, court, date, and paragraph.

sources.name: AustLII
sources.license_tos: Check AustLII terms and source status.
sources.best_for: Australian case law and statutes.
sources.caution: Verify statutory currency and court source.
sources.citation_note: Cite court, neutral citation, date, and paragraph.

sources.name: International Court of Justice
sources.license_tos: Official ICJ materials are public; check procedural stage.
sources.best_for: International legal disputes and ICJ documents.
sources.caution: Distinguish pleadings/allegations from court findings.
sources.citation_note: Cite case, document type, date, and paragraph/page.

sources.name: International Criminal Court
sources.license_tos: Official ICC materials are public; check procedural stage.
sources.best_for: ICC public case records and procedural documents.
sources.caution: Allegations and charges are not findings; preserve presumption language.
sources.citation_note: Cite case, document number, chamber, date, and paragraph.

sources.name: WIPO PATENTSCOPE
sources.license_tos: Check WIPO terms and national-phase limitations.
sources.best_for: International patent-application search.
sources.caution: Patent publication does not prove validity or infringement.
sources.citation_note: Cite publication number, applicant, filing/publication date.

sources.name: Espacenet
sources.license_tos: Check EPO terms and source data limitations.
sources.best_for: Patent/family discovery and prior-art leads.
sources.caution: Legal status should be verified in national registers.
sources.citation_note: Cite publication number and verify legal status separately.

sources.name: EUIPO eSearch
sources.license_tos: Check EUIPO terms and record status.
sources.best_for: EU trademark and design records.
sources.caution: Ownership/status changes need date-specific verification.
sources.citation_note: Cite application/registration number, owner, status, and retrieval date.

sources.name: USPTO Patent Center
sources.license_tos: Check USPTO access terms and file-wrapper rules.
sources.best_for: US patent prosecution documents.
sources.caution: Documents can be technical/legal; avoid overclaiming patent scope.
sources.citation_note: Cite application/publication number, document, and date.

sources.name: USPTO Trademark Search
sources.license_tos: Check USPTO trademark-search terms and TSDR for record details.
sources.best_for: US trademark identity/status checks.
sources.caution: Search result summaries should be verified in the official record.
sources.citation_note: Cite serial/registration number, status, owner, and retrieval date.

sources.name: DPMAregister
sources.license_tos: Check DPMA terms and register status.
sources.best_for: German IP register checks.
sources.caution: Status and owner details are date-sensitive.
sources.citation_note: Cite register number, status, owner, and retrieval date.

sources.name: Google Patents
sources.license_tos: Check Google terms; use as search/index, not final legal-status source.
sources.best_for: Fast patent and prior-art discovery.
sources.caution: Use official patent office records for final legal/status claims.
sources.citation_note: Cite official publication when possible; cite Google Patents as an index.

sources.name: Internet Archive Wayback Machine
sources.license_tos: Check Internet Archive terms and robots/capture limitations.
sources.best_for: Historical website versions and page-preservation leads.
sources.caution: Captures can be incomplete and date-sensitive; do not assume page authorship without corroboration.
sources.citation_note: Cite archived URL, capture timestamp, and live URL if available.

sources.name: Common Crawl
sources.license_tos: Use Common Crawl terms and AWS/public dataset guidance.
sources.best_for: Large-scale historical web corpus analysis.
sources.caution: Requires careful filtering; crawl presence does not prove publication prominence.
sources.citation_note: Cite crawl ID, WARC record, URL, and retrieval method.

sources.name: GDELT Project
sources.license_tos: Check GDELT data terms and query limitations.
sources.best_for: Media monitoring, event leads, and cross-language news discovery.
sources.caution: Machine-coded event data is noisy; verify with original articles.
sources.citation_note: Cite GDELT as lead source and cite original article for claims.

sources.name: Wikidata
sources.license_tos: Wikidata is open but statements vary in sourcing; check individual references.
sources.best_for: Entity disambiguation and external-ID discovery.
sources.caution: Do not treat unsourced statements as verified facts.
sources.citation_note: Cite Wikidata item and original references for material assertions.

sources.name: OpenAlex
sources.license_tos: Check OpenAlex license and data snapshot.
sources.best_for: Academic literature and affiliation discovery.
sources.caution: Author/institution disambiguation can be wrong; verify key records.
sources.citation_note: Cite DOI/original publisher for final claims.

sources.name: Crossref
sources.license_tos: Check Crossref REST API etiquette and metadata license notes.
sources.best_for: DOI metadata and publication lookup.
sources.caution: Metadata is supplied by publishers and may be incomplete.
sources.citation_note: Cite DOI and publisher record for final claims.

sources.name: ORCID
sources.license_tos: Check ORCID public-data terms and user-control model.
sources.best_for: Researcher identity disambiguation where public records exist.
sources.caution: ORCID profiles can be self-maintained and incomplete.
sources.citation_note: Cite ORCID ID and public-record retrieval date.

sources.name: Directory of Open Access Journals
sources.license_tos: Check DOAJ data terms.
sources.best_for: Open-access journal and article discovery.
sources.caution: Inclusion does not prove article quality or correctness.
sources.citation_note: Cite DOAJ record and original journal article.

sources.name: ICIJ Offshore Leaks Database
sources.license_tos: Use ICIJ terms and dataset caveats; high reputational risk.
sources.best_for: Leads on offshore entity networks from ICIJ datasets.
sources.caution: Leak presence is not proof of illegality; verify and apply legal/ethics review.
sources.citation_note: Cite ICIJ database as a lead and explain dataset limitations.

sources.name: OCCRP Aleph
sources.license_tos: Check OCCRP/Aleph source-specific terms and document provenance.
sources.best_for: Investigative document and entity leads.
sources.caution: Source provenance varies; leaked or mirrored data requires legal/ethics review before use.
sources.citation_note: Cite underlying document/source collection and provenance, not only Aleph.

sources.name: LittleSis
sources.license_tos: Check LittleSis terms and cited references for each relationship.
sources.best_for: US power-network and relationship leads.
sources.caution: Relationships must be verified from cited sources before publication.
sources.citation_note: Cite original referenced source for relationship claims.

sources.name: OpenSecrets
sources.license_tos: Check OpenSecrets terms and FEC source links.
sources.best_for: US political money and lobbying analysis.
sources.caution: Use exact data definitions; donor identity and employer data can be sensitive.
sources.citation_note: Cite OpenSecrets and, where material, FEC/source record.

sources.name: Federal Election Commission Data
sources.license_tos: Use FEC API and data terms.
sources.best_for: Official US federal campaign-finance records.
sources.caution: Names/employers require careful identity matching and privacy minimization.
sources.citation_note: Cite committee/report/transaction ID and filing date.

sources.name: EU Transparency Register
sources.license_tos: Check EU Transparency Register terms and update dates.
sources.best_for: EU lobbying registrant checks.
sources.caution: Self-reported data; validate with meetings, filings, or organizational records.
sources.citation_note: Cite registration number, update date, and declared interests.

sources.name: LobbyFacts EU
sources.license_tos: Check LobbyFacts terms and underlying Transparency Register records.
sources.best_for: EU lobbying analysis and historical views.
sources.caution: Use as analysis/index; verify current facts in official EU Transparency Register.
sources.citation_note: Cite LobbyFacts and official Transparency Register entry for final facts.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap
sources.license_tos: OpenStreetMap data is licensed under ODbL; comply with attribution/share-alike.
sources.best_for: Geospatial context, place identification, local infrastructure leads.
sources.caution: Community data can be incomplete or outdated; verify critical facts locally.
sources.citation_note: Attribute OpenStreetMap contributors and cite retrieval date.

sources.name: NASA FIRMS
sources.license_tos: Check NASA FIRMS data policy and attribution requirements.
sources.best_for: Fire/hotspot monitoring and environmental event leads.
sources.caution: Satellite detections require interpretation; do not equate every hotspot with confirmed damage.
sources.citation_note: Cite satellite/instrument, date/time, and FIRMS source.

sources.name: Copernicus Browser
sources.license_tos: Check Copernicus Data Space terms and dataset license.
sources.best_for: Satellite imagery review and environmental/geospatial context.
sources.caution: Image interpretation requires expertise; record processing choices.
sources.citation_note: Cite Sentinel mission, tile/scene, date, and processing.

sources.name: USGS EarthExplorer
sources.license_tos: Check USGS access and dataset-specific terms.
sources.best_for: Historical satellite imagery and remote-sensing datasets.
sources.caution: Registration may be required; interpretation requires caution.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset, scene ID, acquisition date, and processing.

sources.name: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information
sources.license_tos: Check NOAA data policies and dataset documentation.
sources.best_for: Weather, climate, and environmental datasets.
sources.caution: Use station/dataset metadata; avoid overclaiming local causality.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset, station/area, time period, and retrieval date.

sources.name: World Bank Open Data
sources.license_tos: Check World Bank open-data license and indicator definitions.
sources.best_for: Macroeconomic and development indicators.
sources.caution: Indicator definitions and missing data matter; avoid simplistic rankings.
sources.citation_note: Cite indicator code, country, year, and retrieval date.

sources.name: UNdata
sources.license_tos: Check dataset-specific UN data terms.
sources.best_for: UN statistical datasets and country indicators.
sources.caution: Dataset freshness varies; record source agency and update date.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset, agency, indicator, year, and retrieval date.

sources.name: WHO Data
sources.license_tos: Check WHO data terms and indicator methodology.
sources.best_for: Public-health indicators and WHO statistics.
sources.caution: Methodology and reporting differences can change interpretation.
sources.citation_note: Cite indicator, country, period, and retrieval date.

sources.name: OECD Data Explorer
sources.license_tos: Check OECD data terms and dataset notes.
sources.best_for: OECD comparative indicators and datasets.
sources.caution: Compare like with like; definitions can change across countries/years.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset, indicator, country, year, and retrieval date.

sources.name: IMF Data
sources.license_tos: Check IMF data terms and dataset methodology.
sources.best_for: IMF macroeconomic and financial datasets.
sources.caution: Forecasts and estimates differ from observed data; label clearly.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset, indicator, country, period, and retrieval date.

sources.name: ADS-B Exchange Globe
sources.license_tos: Check ADS-B Exchange terms; aircraft tracking can be safety/privacy sensitive.
sources.best_for: Aircraft movement leads and public ADS-B observation.
sources.caution: High privacy/security sensitivity; avoid doxxing or live operational harm.
sources.citation_note: Cite only when public-interest and safety review justify it; archive cautiously.

sources.name: OpenSky Network
sources.license_tos: Check OpenSky API and data terms; account/rate limits may apply.
sources.best_for: Historical/near-real-time aircraft movement research.
sources.caution: Coverage varies; sensitive movement data requires safety review.
sources.citation_note: Cite dataset/API query parameters and time window.

sources.name: FAA Aircraft Registry
sources.license_tos: Check FAA registry use terms.
sources.best_for: US aircraft registration checks.
sources.caution: Ownership records may involve addresses or trusts; minimize personal data.
sources.citation_note: Cite N-number, serial, registration date, and retrieval date.

sources.name: IMO GISIS
sources.license_tos: Check IMO GISIS account and database terms.
sources.best_for: Official IMO maritime data modules where accessible.
sources.caution: Registration and module-specific access limits apply; do not scrape login areas.
sources.citation_note: Cite IMO number/module and retrieval date.

sources.name: Equasis
sources.license_tos: Check Equasis terms and account rules.
sources.best_for: Ship identity and maritime-company leads.
sources.caution: Free login terms apply; verify with flag/class/port-state records.
sources.citation_note: Cite Equasis record and corroborating official maritime source where possible.

sources.name: crt.sh
sources.license_tos: Check crt.sh usage expectations; data comes from certificate transparency logs.
sources.best_for: Domain/subdomain and certificate-history leads.
sources.caution: Certificate presence does not prove website control or active use.
sources.citation_note: Cite certificate ID/log entry and timestamp; corroborate domain control.

sources.name: ICANN Lookup
sources.license_tos: Use ICANN lookup terms and RDAP/WHOIS data minimization.
sources.best_for: Domain registration and registrar leads.
sources.caution: RDAP/WHOIS data may be redacted and privacy-sensitive.
sources.citation_note: Cite domain, registrar, RDAP field, and retrieval date.

sources.name: RDAP Bootstrap
sources.license_tos: Use IANA/RDAP endpoints and registry terms.
sources.best_for: Finding authoritative RDAP services for domains/IPs.
sources.caution: It routes to sources; it does not itself prove registrant facts.
sources.citation_note: Cite final RDAP authority for substantive claims.

sources.name: Censys Search
sources.license_tos: Check Censys terms, account/rate limits, and acceptable use.
sources.best_for: Internet-exposure and infrastructure leads.
sources.caution: Security-sensitive; avoid enabling harm or publishing exploit-enabling details.
sources.citation_note: Cite cautiously and minimize operational details.
